---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or gap.

## Proposed solution
How would you implement this?

## Which layer does this affect?
- [ ] `crypto_engine` — Shamir SSS / cryptographic core
- [ ] `trust_engine` — behavioral authentication
- [ ] `recovery_manager` — quorum / veto logic
- [ ] `guardian_interface` — human firewall layer
- [ ] Mobile (Swift / Kotlin)
- [ ] Docs / tests

## Is this a P0, P1, or P2 priority?
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for priority definitions.

## Additional context
Any references, papers, or prior art worth looking at?
